corePhilosophy: Play like a gentleman for the first 10 moves to build your cage, then execute like an assassin. Build the Cage (Activity) → Run the Anti-Blunder Check (Discipline) → Unleash the Assassin (Attack).
petrosianStyle: Do not attack until the strategic foundation is unshakeable — the tactical conclusion then becomes almost forced (Cage → Stranglehold → Outpost → Crush).

cageRules.mvpBishop: Bc4 → Bb3 or Ba2 to preserve a2-g8 diagonal
cageRules.prophylaxis: a4 before castling (secure escape hatch); h3 before Nbd2 or Re1 (prevent ...Bg4 pin)
cageRules.sequence: a4 (if needed) → O-O → h3 → Re1 → Nbd2 → Nf1
never: Castle before a4 when ...Na5 is possible

fourStepMentalLoop: 1. Opponent’s Intent (Anti-Blunder + Ghost Check): What is the point of their move? What did they stop defending?
2. CCT Scan: Can I play a forcing Check, Capture, or Threat?
3. Lazy Piece Upgrade: Improve the least active piece (e.g. Nbd2-f1-g3-f5)
4. Pre-Move Check: Visualize the move, look away, verify safety, check heart rate

drillSergeant.objective: Land your knight on f5 within 6 moves without breaking the Italian Cage

fens.coachNote: Pure cage locked. Light-squared bishop safe on a2. Begin the knight tour.
Queenside cramped with a4, bishop on a2. Center stable — start knight journey.
Refused drawish Petrov. Prove superiority by pivoting the knight.
Nbd2 early. Visualize Re1, Nf1, Ng3, Nf5. Watch central breaks.
Black played ...a6. Use b4 (Search and Destroy) to distract, then route knight.
Knight on f1. Position looks passive but the spring is coiled.
Knight on g3. One move from f5. Scan for ...d5 or ...g6.
Parasitic infection planted. Kingside now claustrophobic.
Black weakened with ...h6. Look for Greek Gift or high-velocity sacs.
Climax of the 5-Tactic Arsenal. Nf5 + Qd2 aligned — sacrifice Bxh6 to shatter the shield.

phase1TriageQuiz.q: Petrov 3rd move to drag them into the cage?
When to retreat bishop to Ba2?
phase1TriageQuiz.a: Only when Black commits to ...Na5 or queenside expansion

fiveTacticArsenal.name: The Strangler Knight (f5)
fiveTacticArsenal.trigger: Hole on f5 or ...h6 played (no g6)

fiveTacticArsenal.name: Toxic Bait (Bg5 + h4)
fiveTacticArsenal.execute: h4, let them take, open h-file

fiveTacticArsenal.name: High-Velocity Sacks (Bxh6)
fiveTacticArsenal.trigger: ...h6 defended only once + Qd2 + knight on f5/g3

fiveTacticArsenal.name: Central Explosion (d4)
fiveTacticArsenal.trigger: Cage fully built + Black commits to flank

chaosProtocol: Under 1000 Elo: Do NOT abandon the cage to grab material unless completely safe. Always run CCT first. Taking must accelerate development or not expose king.
smirnovConsensus: Phase A: Build the Cage First (maximum activity — develop pieces, castle, connect rooks)
Phase B: Assassin Execution (coiled spring — attack once foundation is set)
Gentleman's Discipline: Anti-blunder triage — never be deflected before development is complete
trainingOrders: If you cannot score 10/10 on the Triage Quiz instantly, review until the 10-move cage is muscle memory. Load the 10 FENs vs Stockfish Level 3. Do not stop until Nbd2-f1-g3-f5 is pure geometry. Then move to the next 150-minute block.
